summary: Iteration 11: Tested PPS upload/verification workflow and age display features. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed - age display, PPS link, PPS columns in organizer table verified.
passed_tests: Backend Test 1: POST /api/registrations/{id}/upload-pps requires authentication - PASSED
Backend Test 2: Upload PPS fails for non-existent registration (404) - PASSED
Backend Test 3: Upload PPS rejects invalid file types (.exe, etc.) - PASSED
Backend Test 4: Upload PPS success with PDF file - PASSED
Backend Test 5: POST /api/registrations/{id}/verify-pps requires organizer/admin role - PASSED
Backend Test 6: Organizer can approve PPS (action=approve) - PASSED
Backend Test 7: Organizer can reject PPS (action=reject) - PASSED
Backend Test 8: Admin can also approve PPS - PASSED
Backend Test 9: Registration contains pps_status field after verification - PASSED
Backend Test 10: Registrations include age field when birth_date provided - PASSED
Backend Test 11: Organizer registrations endpoint returns pps_status and pps_document_url fields - PASSED
Backend Test 12: Events have requires_pps field - PASSED
UI Test 1: EventDetailPage loads with PPS badge for events requiring PPS - PASSED
UI Test 2: PPS info section visible on EventDetailPage ('Pass Prévention Santé Requis') - PASSED
UI Test 3: PPS link to https://pps.athle.fr/?locale=fr visible on EventDetailPage - PASSED
UI Test 4: Registration form shows birth_date input with data-testid='birth-date-input' - PASSED
UI Test 5: Age display (data-testid='age-display') shows calculated age (e.g., '35 ans') - PASSED
UI Test 6: PPS number input field visible in registration form for events requiring PPS - PASSED
UI Test 7: PPS link in registration dialog ('Acheter un PPS sur athle.fr') - PASSED
UI Test 8: OrganizerEventPage has Age column (ÂGE) in registrations table - PASSED
UI Test 9: OrganizerEventPage has PPS column in registrations table - PASSED
UI Test 10: Registrations table shows age values (e.g., '35 ans') - PASSED
UI Test 11: Participant dashboard loads successfully - PASSED
UI Test 12: Participant login works (pierre@test.com) - PASSED
UI Test 13: Organizer login works (club@paris-sport.fr) - PASSED
seed_data_creation: PPS document uploaded to pierre@test.com's registration during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 completed. All PPS upload/verification features tested and working: 1) POST /api/registrations/{id}/upload-pps allows participant to upload PPS doc (PDF/JPG/PNG, max 10MB). 2) POST /api/registrations/{id}/verify-pps with action=approve/reject allows organizer/admin to verify. 3) EventDetailPage shows age calculation (data-testid='age-display') under birth_date field. 4) PPS link to https://pps.athle.fr/?locale=fr visible on EventDetailPage and in registration dialog. 5) OrganizerEventPage registrations table has Age (ÂGE) and PPS columns. 6) PPS approve/reject buttons (data-testid='approve-pps-{reg_id}') appear when document is uploaded. Note: ParticipantDashboard PPS upload section only shows for events with requires_pps=true - currently only evt_91314edc7df8 has this.

mocked_apis.RFID_integration: POST /api/rfid-read is simulated - no real hardware (MOCKED)
mocked_apis.PPS_number_verification: Returns simulated success - auto-validates PPS format (MOCKED)

new_features_tested: OrganizerEventPage Age (ÂGE) column in registrations table
OrganizerEventPage PPS column with approve/reject buttons
Registration stores age field when birth_date provided
ui_components_verified: EventDetailPage - PPS badge, PPS info section, PPS link
Registration dialog - birth_date input, age display, PPS number input, PPS link
OrganizerEventPage - Age column, PPS column headers
ParticipantDashboard - PPS upload section (conditional on requires_pps)
